news.summary: The MD Anderson Cancer Center has successfully dosed the first pediatric patient with ASXL1-associated Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML). This program is backed by the Rare Pediatric Disease Designation (RPDD). This milestone marks an important step in research and treatment for pediatric AML patients, indicating progress in addressing the rare disease.
news.headline: First pediatric AML patient dosed in SELLAS Life Sciences Phase 2 trial of SLS009; program supported by Rare Pediatric Disease Designation.

news.summary: In Brooklyn, NY, on May 15, 2025, Cemtrex Inc., a company specializing in advanced security technology and industrial services, released its financial and operational results for the fiscal second quarter ending on March 31, 2024. The company's stock is listed on NASDAQ under the tickers CETX and CETXP.
news.headline: Cemtrex Inc. (NASDAQ: CETX, CETXP) reports Q2 fiscal year 2025 results ended March 31, 2024. #financialnews
XIAOMI CHAIRMAN LEI JUN: XIAOMI’S SELF-DEVELOPED MOBILE SOC CHIP "XRING O1" TO LAUNCH IN LATE MAY $XIACY

news.summary: Jacob Hanika has been appointed as the Vice President of Franchise at Five Star Franchising, the rapidly expanding platform of home service brands Bio-One and 1-800-Packouts. This move was announced on May 15, 2025, and signifies the company's commitment to franchise development. Hanika will be responsible for leading franchise development for both brands, in a bid to further grow the platform. Five Star Franchising has been steadily increasing its presence in the market, and Hanika's hiring is a strategic decision to drive this growth.
news.headline: Jacob Hanika appointed as VP of Franchise Development at Five Star Franchising for Bio-One and 1-800-Packouts brands.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025 in Beijing, BOE organized the second edition of the "Define the Future Green Eco-Forum" during Display Week 2025. The event focused on "Green Development" and promoted mutually beneficial solutions.
news.headline: BOE hosted 2nd Green Eco-Forum during Display Week 2025 in Beijing, focused on "Green Development".

news.summary: An upcoming auction on May 29, 2025, in DENVER, Pa will feature 300 rare European and American toys and trains, including highly sought-after Marklin productions. Notable items to be auctioned off include a 1904 Ferris Wheel, a 45-inch Amerika ocean liner, and the Gefion battleship. Many of these items are considered sole survivors in their categories. The auction will be hosted by Morphy's as Part I of a larger event.
news.headline: Antique toy expert's collection of 300 rare European and American toys to be auctioned on May 29 at Morphy's.

news.summary: A member of Congress and CEO of a tiny home manufacturing company are in talks to establish a consultancy for the Department of Housing and Urban Development (H.U.D.). U.S. Congresswoman Lauren Boebert from Colorado will be presenting a proposal to the H.U.D. Secretary, outlining strategies developed by Andy Curry, CEO of My Home Sweet Tiny Home. The initiative, set to take place in LAMAR, Colo, is aimed at providing expert advice to H.U.D. The upcoming proposal is expected to address key aspects regarding affordable housing and related policies.
news.headline: Congresswoman Boebert and CEO Curry in talks to advise H.U.D. on housing crisis, aiming to ease it; numbers not provided.

news.summary: In San Francisco on May 15, 2025, the accounting automation platform Synder revealed its latest partnership with NetSuite, a prominent cloud ERP system by Oracle. This collaboration aims to assist the growing number of retail, ecommerce, and SaaS businesses that rely on Synder's services. With thousands of businesses already leveraging Synder's platform, this integration with NetSuite is poised to offer enhanced efficiency and support for these entities.
news.headline: Synder integrates with NetSuite to automate accounting for businesses, benefits thousands. Ideal for fast-growing businesses.

news.summary: Xfinity has made an announcement that all their customers can now enjoy free access to Sunday Night Soccer on the MLS Season Pass. This move allows Xfinity subscribers to watch their favorite matches at no extra cost. This initiative will grant access to a wide range of MLS games throughout the season, offering fans an exciting opportunity to watch soccer games on Sunday nights. The offer includes access to live games, highlights, and exclusive content. This decision is likely to be welcomed by soccer enthusiasts, as it provides additional value to Xfinity services.
news.headline: Xfinity offers free access to Sunday Night Soccer on MLS Season Pass for all customers.

news.summary: A renowned manufacturer of heating solutions based in Racine, Wisconsin, has recently been recognized by the oldest and most prestigious industrial design award program. Modine (NYSE: MOD), a leading global company specializing in advanced thermal management technology, was awarded the Good Design accolade for its innovative products. This recognition reflects the company's commitment to excellence and design innovation. The award was presented on May 15, 2025, solidifying Modine's position as a key player in the industry.
news.headline: Modine wins 2024 Good Design Award for Amp Dawg® residential unit heater, recognized by oldest award program.

news.summary: CAVA Group, Inc. is set to announce its Q1 earnings after market close on Thursday, May 15. Analysts anticipate earnings of 15 cents per share, an increase from 13 cents per share in the same period last year. Projections from Benzinga Pro show expected quarterly revenue at $327.71 million, up from $259.01 million in the previous year. The company is also poised to replace Altair Engineering in the S&P MidCap 400 index according to S&P Dow Jones Indices as of March 26. CAVA's shares closed at $99.54 on Wednesday, marking a 0.2% decrease. For more details, refer to the full coverage on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Wall Street forecasts for CAVA have been revised ahead of Q1 earnings. Expected earnings: 15 cents/share, revenue: $327.71 million. CAVA to replace Altair Engineering in S&P MidCap 400. CAVA shares closed at $99.54.

news.summary: A strategic partnership was announced between Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) and iFood to improve convenience for Brazilian consumers. Users of iFood will be able to book Uber rides directly through the app, while Uber users can access iFood's delivery services for food, groceries, pharmacy items, and convenience goods within the Uber app. This partnership aims to simplify daily tasks for Brazilians by offering transportation and delivery services through their commonly used apps. The integrated services will start in certain Brazilian cities in the second phase.
news.headline: Uber and iFood partner in Brazil, allowing iFood users to book Uber rides and Uber users access iFood's services.

news.summary: Rocket Lab USA, Inc. (NASDAQ: RKLB) has been awarded by NASA to launch the Aspera mission, an astrophysics science project focusing on galaxy formation and evolution. The mission aims to offer fresh insights into the workings of the universe. NASA has picked Rocket Lab for the Aspera astrophysics mission, which will investigate galaxy formation via ultraviolet light. The launch is scheduled to take place on the Electron from Launch Complex 1, with a target date set for the first quarter of 2026. Aspera will employ a telescope to examine ultraviolet light and study the intergalactic medium's hot gas. This decision comes as Rocket Lab secures a new contract, bolstering its position ahead of earnings. For more details, you can find the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Rocket Lab (NASDAQ: RKLB) wins NASA contract to launch Aspera mission studying galaxy formation, targeting Q1 2026.

news.summary: President Donald J. Trump signed a landmark agreement with the government of Qatar on Wednesday, with the aim of fostering an economic partnership valued at a minimum of $1.2 trillion, as per a statement released by the White House. Additionally, President Trump revealed that the economic deals struck between the United States and Qatar amounted to over $243.5 billion. These agreements encompassed a notable transaction involving the sale of Boeing Company (NYSE: BA) aircraft and GE Aerospace (NYSE: GE) engines to Qatar Airways for $96 billion. The specifics of the deal included an arrangement between Qatar Airways and Boeing for the purchase of a potential 210 widebody aircraft, marking a historic milestone as Boeing's largest-ever order for widebody planes and the most substantial order for 787 Dreamliners.
news.headline: President Trump secures $1.2 trillion agreement with Qatar, including $243.5 billion economic agreements with a $96 billion purchase of Boeing aircraft and GE engines by Qatar Airways.

news.summary: Havila Shipping ASA convened its Annual General Meeting on May 15, 2025, where all proposed items on the agenda were successfully ratified. The detailed minutes from the meeting will be appended and can be accessed on the corporate website. For further information, please reach out to CEO Njål Sævik at +47 909 35 722 or CFO Arne Johan Dale at +47 909 87 706.
news.headline: Havila Shipping ASA held its AGM on May 15, 2025, with all proposals approved. CEO's contact: +47 909 35 722. CFO's contact: +47 909 87 706.

news.summary: In Encino, California on May 15, 2025, HRC Fertility and Dr. Robert Boostanfar gained attention after a powerful TV feature on 90 Day Fiancé. The segment showcased their empathetic and diverse fertility care practices, drawing in a diverse pool of prospective parents.
news.headline: HRC Fertility and Dr. Robert Boostanfar gain attention for their inclusive fertility care after TV appearance.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, gutzy Organic® announced the launch of two new Prebiotic Plant Protein Smoothie Pouches in response to rising consumer interest in convenient, gut-friendly snacks. The new flavors, Tropical Mango and Cherry Berry Acai, are part of the company's expansion efforts. This release caters to the growing demand for on-the-go protein options.
news.headline: gutzy Organic® launches new Prebiotic Plant Protein Smoothie Pouches- Tropical Mango & Cherry Berry Acai to meet surging demand for gut-friendly snacks in 2025.

news.summary: A major announcement was made today in Arlington, Virginia, as The AAKOMA Project unveiled the highly awaited 2025 State of Mental Health of Youth and Young Adults of Color (SOMHYOC) Full Report. This pioneering research effort is set to revolutionize the understanding of mental health in marginalized communities. The comprehensive report provides vital insights into the mental well-being of young individuals of color. Developed by The AAKOMA Project, this groundbreaking initiative aims to shed light on the mental health challenges faced by this demographic. This report is poised to have a significant impact on mental health discourse and policy moving forward.
news.headline: The AAKOMA Project releases groundbreaking study on mental health of youths and young adults of color in 2025.

news.summary: A recent study by Navy Federal Credit Union in Vienna, Virginia, showcases the benefits of membership with the not-for-profit credit union. In 2024, members collectively earned and saved $4.32 billion by banking with the institution. This equates to an average of $461 per member annually, enabling them to save $332 through improved interest rates and $129 through reduced fees and discounts. The study's findings are based on internal market analyses conducted by the credit union.
news.headline: Navy Federal Credit Union's 2024 Member Giveback Study shows members saved $4.32 billion by banking with them. Members saved $461 annually, with $332 on interest rates and $129 on fees.

news.summary: Atlanta-based company, Floor & Decor (NYSE: FND), a prominent retailer of hard-surface flooring for both homeowners and professionals, has revealed the recent inauguration of its latest warehouse store in San Antonio, Texas. The new location, situated at 7607 IH 35, Suite #105, has been established with a workforce of around 45 full-time and part-time employees. The store is under the guidance of Marco Jasso, the Chief Executive Merchant. Floor & Decor currently operates over 2 retail outlets nationwide.
news.headline: Floor & Decor opens new store in San Antonio, Texas at 7607 IH 35 with 45 associates.

news.summary: A company based in Lehi, Utah, Owlet, Inc., recently contributed 250 of its FDA-approved Dream Sock® smart baby monitors to the March of Dimes’ NICU Care Package Kit initiative.
news.headline: Owlet donates 250 Dream Sock smart baby monitors worth $75,000 to March of Dimes' NICU Care Package Kit program.

news.summary: Based in Novato, California, QT Imaging Holdings, Inc. (OTCQB:QTIH) is a medical technology company specializing in the advancement of innovative body imaging systems. Recently, the company successfully delivered and set up its QT Imaging Breast Acoustic CT™ Scanner at Innovative Radiology, led by Dr. John Tentinger in Des Moines, Iowa. This milestone marks the introduction of QT Imaging’s revolutionary radiation-free, 3D breast imaging technology to patients in Iowa for the first time. This state-of-the-art system aims to provide advanced imaging solutions for improved patient care.
news.headline: QT Imaging delivers its Breast Acoustic CT Scanner to Innovative Radiology in Des Moines, Iowa, bringing radiation-free 3D breast imaging technology to Iowa for the first time.

news.summary: A recent report highlights the financial benefits for mobile operators in rural areas to opt for Satellite Direct-to-Device services over constructing more towers. Released by Mobile Experts on May 15, 2025 from Campbell, California, the report details the economic advantages, showing that utilizing this service could be more cost-effective than expanding rural tower infrastructure. This provides an alternative method for operators looking to improve coverage in rural regions.
news.headline: Report by Mobile Experts shows using Satellite Direct-to-Device will reduce rural tower deployment by half for mobile operators.

news.summary: In New York on May 15, 2025, the Real Estate Limited Partner Institute (RELPI)® introduced a novel video and podcast platform along with the debut of a new series called "Elevator Pitch with Jonathan and Mitch℠." This series includes a combination of video and podcast features, aiming to provide innovative content to its audience.
news.headline: Real Estate Limited Partnership Institute introduces "Elevator Pitch with Jonathan and Mitch" podcast, featuring top investors.

news.summary: In San Francisco, LiveRamp has been acknowledged by the IDC MarketScape for its comprehensive partner network, interoperable architecture, and native activation capabilities.
news.headline: LiveRamp is a leader in 2025 IDC MarketScape for Data Clean Room Tech for Advertising with extensive partner network.

news.summary: Jesta I.S., a leading provider of enterprise ERP suites, has recently introduced Vision Ask Jane, an innovative solution designed for retail and wholesale companies operating in the apparel, footwear, and hard goods industries. This new product utilizes artificial intelligence technology to enhance operations and decision-making processes.
news.headline: Jesta I.S. introduces Vision Ask Jane, an AI/ML advisor for retail. Targets apparel, footwear, hard goods industry.

news.summary: Priority Technology Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PRTH) based in Alpharetta, Georgia, a fintech company specializing in payments and banking services, has disclosed its participation in upcoming investor conferences. Specifically, on May 21, 2025, the company's management will be present at the B. Riley 25th Annual Investor Conference located in Marina Del Rey, CA. Additionally, on June 3 and June [Unknown date], they will also be participating in other events to discuss their services and revenue opportunities.
news.headline: Priority Technology Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PRTH) to attend investor conferences, including B. Riley 25th Annual Investor Conference on May 21, 2025.

news.summary: Based in Hawthorne, California, OSI Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: OSIS) shared that its Executive Chairman of the Board, Deepak Chopra, recently received the Lifetime Achievement Award from the Los Angeles Chapter of the Association for Corporate Growth (ACG® Los Angeles). This prestigious award recognizes Chopra's outstanding career marked by valuable contributions to the business sector, such as mentorship, adept deal-making skills, and active community involvement within Southern California's growth environment. The accolade underscores Chopra's significant impact on the industry, celebrating his commitment and success in various aspects of corporate growth.
news.headline: Deepak Chopra of OSI Systems awarded Lifetime Achievement by ACG Los Angeles for career contributions in business ecosystem.

news.summary: 733Park, an investment advisory firm based in Boston, is currently representing Project Clarion. Project Clarion is a rapidly expanding cross-border payments and foreign exchange infrastructure platform. The company is considering a strategic sale or acquisition. Project Clarion offers a comprehensive global payment solution with built-in compliance, support for multiple currencies, fixed pricing for foreign exchange, and instant transaction tracking. The platform serves over 3,000 active clients and processes over $1 billion in annual transactions.
news.headline: 733Park is selling Project Clarion, a cross-border payments platform with 3,000 customers and over $1 billion annual volume.

news.summary: In Carlsbad, California, KTNF has implemented a MaxLinear solution to enhance data transfer speeds and improve storage device efficiency. This technology enables real-time compression of server-generated data, leading to significant optimizations.
news.headline: KTNF partners with MaxLinear in Carlsbad, Calif to boost data transfer speeds and optimize storage operations.
